title.en: Then, Ye Tian began to practice the second set ...

content.en:
After obtaining the cultivation method of the second set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Technique, Ye Tian began to open up some of the corresponding meridians.

Since most of the meridians corresponding to the second set of actions coincided with the first set of movements, Ye Tian did not need to open many meridians, and soon all the meridians that needed to be opened were opened.

Then, Ye Tian began to practice the second set of movements.

At the beginning, the second set of movements was very difficult to cultivate, but Ye Tian didn't worry about time at all, and with his fast recovery speed, he was simply naturally suitable for cultivating the Eighteen Golden Body Technique.

As time passed, Ye Tian was fast in the second set of moves.

At the same time, Ye Tian's physical strength was becoming more and more exaggerated, even stronger than some artifacts, enough for his physical body to resist the edge of the artifact.

Originally, Ye Tian was going to continue to cultivate the second set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Technique, and strive to cultivate the second set of movements to the consummation realm.

But suddenly, one day, Ye Tian had a feeling of panic, especially when he was cultivating the second set of movements, that feeling of panic became stronger and stronger.

In normal times, it can be easily suppressed, but it is not possible to cultivate the Eighteen Golden Body Technique.

"What's going on?"

Ye Tian was very puzzled.

After pondering for a long time, Ye Tian finally understood the reason.

Mood problems!

"It's strange that my state of mind has reached the fifth level, and there are still mood problems?"

Ye Tian was very puzzled.

You must know that many powerful gods, because they have not cultivated the state of mind method, are far inferior to him in terms of state of mind.

But even so, he was still flawed in his state of mind, and he couldn't continue to cultivate the Eighteen Golden Body Technique.

"There is no mention of the state of mind on the eighteen golden body recipes, maybe in the last cosmic era, the state of mind was the major, so there is no need to mention it, and now in this universe, the state of mind is generally very poor, so it has become a defect. In this way, I must raise my state of mind to the sixth level before I can continue to cultivate the Eighteen Golden Body Technique!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It is not easy to improve the state of mind, especially when the fifth level of state of mind hits the sixth level of state of mind.

He cultivated the Dark Silence Sutra, and as long as he cultivated the fifth layer of the Darkness Silence Sutra, he could cultivate the sixth level of mind.

But if you want to practice to the fifth layer of the Dark Silence Sutra, how can it be so simple!

"Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower!"

Ye Tian suddenly thought of this treasure.

According to the machine spirit, the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower is the treasure of the Six Paths Temple, and its real use is to construct the Six Paths of Reincarnation World, allowing people to experience the reincarnation of a lifetime, which is similar to the effect of the Reincarnation Mirror in the Supreme Divine Book of the Human Race, but the effect is much stronger than the Reincarnation Mirror.

And one of the greatest abilities of the Six Realms Reincarnation Tower is to make people reincarnate, but it requires a certain price.

Reincarnation, what a terrible ability!

For example, there is a god with limited talent, and he can only be promoted to the god level in his life, and there is no way to impact the true god level.

Once you reach the end of your life, you can only wait for death.

But if there are six reincarnation towers to pay, you can send them to reincarnate and cultivate again.

After reincarnation, everything is like a new soul, and the life span naturally starts from the beginning.

It can be said that the usefulness of the Six Realms Reincarnation Tower is too great!

For Ye Tian personally, the usefulness of the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower is average, but for a race or a force, the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower is definitely a true supreme treasure, enough to affect the rise and fall of a race!

Of course.

Most of the origin of the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower is still asleep, and if you want to stimulate all the origins, the price you need to pay is unimaginable to Ye Tian.

Therefore, the Six Realms of Reincarnation Pagoda is now unable to help people reincarnate.

Swish!

Ye Tian summoned the Six Realms of Reincarnation Tower, summoned the Instrument Spirit, and asked, "Instrument Spirit, can the Six Realms of Reincarnation Pagoda now allow me to enter the Six Realms of Reincarnation and experience the state of ascetic cultivation?"

The machine spirit replied: "It can be, but now you can only enter the Heavenly Dao and the Asura Dao, and the other four reincarnation worlds can't be opened!"

"Okay, then I'll enter the Heavenly Humanity Reincarnation World first for reincarnation experience!"

Ye Tian thought for a while and said.

The machine spirit reminded: "Master, enter the reincarnation world constructed by the Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower, the more reincarnation worlds you experience, the better the effect of the experience, but if you can't awaken your memories in the reincarnation world, it is equivalent to failure, and you can't carry out the next reincarnation experience, so you can only be forced to be brought out by the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower." Regarding the experience of reincarnation, I can't help the master, I can only rely on the master himself!"

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded, and immediately asked the machine spirit to mobilize the power of the Six Reincarnation Towers.

Bang!!!

A reincarnation passage appeared in the hall of the Reincarnation Tower, representing the Heavenly Humanity.

Ye Tian entered the reincarnation of heaven and humanity, and the reincarnation reincarnation went away.

Of course, this is not a real reincarnation, just a fictional reincarnation, but everything is experienced as if it were a real scene.

The world of reincarnation, the world of heaven and man.

Ye Tian was born in an ordinary family of the Celestial Race and became a Celestial.

The Celestial Race is a fictitious perfect race, which is very powerful from birth, and its understanding and talent are very terrifying, surpassing countless races.

When he was just born, Ye Tian had no memory, like a blank piece of paper, absorbing all the knowledge of this world, and began to embark on the path of cultivation, slowly cultivating from weak to strong.

Decades later, Ye Tian stepped into the emperor level and fought again and again.

Suddenly, one day, after a life-and-death struggle, he was in a coma for ten days and ten nights, and then Ye Tian awakened his true memory.

"The world of heaven and man, the world of heaven and man, this is the world of reincarnation constructed by heaven and earth!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Judging from the situation in this world, the strongest is at most a galaxy-level powerhouse, and the great god level is enough to dominate one side.

But this does not mean that this world is weak, because in terms of strength of the same level, the strong people of the Celestial Race in this world far exceed the ordinary strong people of the Human Race.

For example, the seven- or eight-star emperor level and even the Tianjiao level emperor level in this world are common, and there are even many emperor levels comparable to the son of the universe.

After awakening his memory, Ye Tian's progress was even faster, and he soon became famous.

At the beginning, Ye Tian only regarded this world as an illusory world, only as a trial, and did not care much about everything in this world.

But one day, Ye Tian suddenly came to his senses.

He seems to have walked out of a path different from the real world in the Six Realms of Reincarnation, but embarked on the path of the Celestial Race, and the large number of Celestial Race secret techniques are simply true.

"Yes, the world may be fake, but the cultivation method is true, the six reincarnation worlds construct the reincarnation world, but something must exist, otherwise the reincarnation world cannot exist. In such a world, it is actually secondary to improve one's state of mind, and with the help of the world of reincarnation, one can comprehend countless secret techniques and take another path. Witnessing your own path of chaos supreme strength through one path after another, that is the greatest gain!"

Thinking like this, Ye Tian's mentality changed, and he treated this kind of reincarnation as the real world.

As the long years passed, Ye Tian browsed countless secret scriptures and cultivation techniques, and his strength also improved from the emperor level to the god level, the true god level, and the great god level, and finally reached the limit of this world and became one of the strongest people in this world.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian's lifespan reached the limit, he fell and died, and entered the second life.

In the second life.

Ye Tian still didn't have the memory of awakening at first, starting from a baby and slowly growing up.

The world in the second life is much weaker than the first life, but it is still the world of the Celestial Race.

At the age of eighteen, Ye Tian luckily awakened his memory and began a brilliant life again!

III!

IV!

V!

VI!

......

Ye Tian didn't know how long it had been in the real world, he only knew that he had spent nine lives in the reincarnation world.

In the process of reincarnation, he has almost studied the path of heaven and humanity, and his attainments are not weaker than those of the real world.

In the tenth life, Ye Tian's luck was not so good, because of an accident before he awakened his memory, he was killed, and the reincarnation ended.

Among the six reincarnation towers.

Ye Tian came back, and his eyes seemed to be full of vicissitudes.

At this time, his state of mind soared, and perhaps as long as he comprehended the Dark Silence Sutra a little, he could truly raise his state of mind to the sixth level.

"It's been twenty years!"

Ye Tian muttered, feeling that the outside world was passing so fast.

At this time, there are still asura paths that have not entered.

After pondering for a while, Ye Tian still decided to enter the Asura Dao, maybe there would be an unexpected gain.

Immediately, he let the machine spirit urge the six reincarnation towers and enter the Asura Path.

The reincarnation world of the Asura Dao is full of killing, and the endless killing aura fills the reincarnation world.

In the first life, Ye Tian descended into the home of a general in a certain Asura Realm, and began to cultivate killing ability since he was a child.

Since the endless killing almost blinded Ye Tian's heart, in such a situation, it was difficult for Ye Tian to awaken the memories of his previous life.

In an accident, Ye Tian was almost on the verge of death, and in the chaos of his soul, he awakened his memory.

In this life, Ye Tian walked the path of killing, and it was also the path of asura.

In the midst of countless killings, Ye Tian can be said to have condensed the killing heart, and a wisp of killing intent can kill the enemy.

In the end, Ye Tian also became an incomparably terrifying Asura in this life.

The second life!

The third life!

Fourth!

In the reincarnation of the first life, Ye Tian caused the inner demon and almost became a real killing demon, but in the end, he relied on the experience and experience of heaven and humanity to forcibly suppress the inner demon in this life.

IX.

Ye Tian, who had already become the strongest person in this Asura World, was staying in his Supreme Demon Palace.

At this point, he was ready to do something very important.

That is to cut off the heart demon, once the heart demon is cut off, his state of mind will inevitably rise, and he doesn't even need to cultivate the Dark Silence True Sutra, his state of mind can directly enter the sixth level.

When the time comes, the magic will go by itself!

Wow!

An Asura knife appeared in front of Ye Tian.

The knife was aimed at his heart, and he forcibly triggered the demon in his heart and slashed himself hard.

Burst!!!

A knife through the body!

Ye Tian screamed miserably, he was injured, and the demon in his heart was also injured.

This method of slaying the heart demon is undoubtedly a lose-lose method, but Ye Tian chose this most direct method, because this is the reincarnation experience world, and he is not afraid of death.

Puff puff!!!

With a single sword, Ye Tian's body was seriously injured, and the heart demon was also slashed by the Asura knife again and again, almost collapsing.

"The last sword, the Asura God Destroying Sword!"

After a knife.

The heart demon disappeared, and Ye Tian also died completely.

The 10th!

As soon as he was born, Ye Tian awakened his memory.

At this time, his state of mind had already broken through!

"The sixth layer of the state of mind, haha, I'm afraid no one will forcibly slay the heart demon and break the state of mind like me. The sixth level of state of mind, with my current state of mind level, there are very few things that can shake my state of mind!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In this life, Ye Tian lived a very stable life, although he was in the world of killing, he did not kill too much, and only spent this life studying killing.

Ye Tian instinctively wanted to spend the eleventh life again, but what he won was not the eleventh life, but directly returned to the hall of the Six Dao Reincarnation Tower.

"Master, your state of mind has reached the sixth level, and it is useless to you at the current level of the reincarnation world, and the power of the six reincarnation towers has consumed a lot, and it will be difficult to open the reincarnation world again for the time being!" the machine spirit explained.

"So that's the case, it doesn't matter, anyway, I've already raised my state of mind to the sixth level, and I don't need to go through the reincarnation experience anymore!" Ye Tian smiled.

The state of mind broke through, and Ye Tian was ready to cultivate the second set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Technique.

This time, he should be able to cultivate the second set of movements to the consummation realm!
